name: Suning.com Co., Ltd.
summary: Suning.com Co., Ltd. engages in the retail business in China. Its stores offer various products, including home appliances, 3C products, and mother-and-baby care products, department store products, home installation products, books, smart home, financial products, etc. The company also sells its products online. In addition, the company offers supply chain finance, consumer finance, and payment services. As of December 31, 2018, the company operated 8881 self-operated stores and 2071 franchised stores in Suning.com. The company was formerly known as Suning Commerce Group Co., Ltd. and changed its name to Suning.com Co., Ltd. in February 2018. Suning.com Co., Ltd. was founded in 1990 and is based in Nanjing, China.
